commands.review_summary:
The branch adds opt-in terminal fallback metadata/result helpers across agent-core, Plugin SDK tool plugins, embedded-runner terminal fallback handling, built-in cron/web_fetch tools, channel delivery evidence, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +3308, Tests +8435, Docs +79, Generated 0, Other +3. Total +11825 across 69 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a medium-confidence reproduction path: current main has no declared terminal fallback metadata or `toolResult(...)` escape hatch, so terminal tool-loop/incomplete-turn paths cannot surface these safe tool-owned summaries. I did not run a before-fix live Discord scenario in this read-only review.
